name: KKR & Co. Inc.
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. is a global investment firm offering asset management and insurance services. Its asset management business spans private equity, real assets, credit, and hedge fund partnerships. Its insurance business operates through Global Atlantic, a financial group offering retirement and life insurance products. KKR manages a wide array of funds, CLOs, BDCs, and separately managed accounts for institutional and individual investors worldwide.
